  3. Custom Table tents - Custom Printed Tent Cards | Banners.com

Table Tents

Custom Printed Table Tents

 
  • Product Overview
  • Templates

Product Specs

Table tent cards are digitally printed on high-quality 13.4 pt, coverstock paper and are available in either a gloss or matte coated finish.  The finished size for each of your table tent cards will be (h x w) 4.25" x 6.00", 5.00" x 5.00" and 7.00" x 5.00".

Artwork

Artwork Guidelines

Vector-based file types will print best, such as .eps or .ai (Adobe Illustrator) — with fonts converted to outlines. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files. If you are unsure of the quality of your files, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you.

Color Match Proof System

If your project is color critical, we recommend using our Color Match Proof System, as this is the best way to ensure the color match for your postcards. For more details, please contact a customer service representative.

Production Times

Production Time Tables

We provide flexible production time ranges for you to choose from. Because it's important for you to have ultimate control over your order, our production times range from one to five business days. This allows you to make the final decision on when you need your order.

1 Business Day Priority:

Timelines can be tight. That's why we offer this zippy one day turnaround option. 

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

2 Business Days Express:

Have an extra day, but still need your products quickly? The express option is ideal for you!

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

3 Business Days Standard:

This is our most popular fast turnaround option. Free and speedy enough for almost any custom order.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

5 Business Days Saver:

If you’re not in a rush, then you can save some money by choosing our 5-Days Saver option.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day,
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information,
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time.
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given.

Payment

All table tent cards must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover cards. We also accept checks, which must be received before your order is put into production. For more information on check orders, see this article on our blog..

We will not charge your credit card until you have approved your order.

Shipping

General Shipping Guidelines

If you have any questions about shipping, please contact customer service at (320) 965-9300 prior to ordering. Unless otherwise specified at the time of ordering, your order will be shipped via UPS Ground. We offer a 1–3 day ground shipment to 90% of the United States.

You will receive a tracking number once your package has been shipped.

Shipping prices are determined by the weight and destination of the package. Additional shipping charges apply to large orders.

After products have been shipped, all shipping company terms and conditions apply for lost or delayed packages. We will not refund the banner cost if UPS or any other shipping company has a delay in your package.

Delays due to natural disasters or anything beyond our control will not result in shipping refunds. If the product is damaged in shipping, damaged goods must be returned, and then a replacement product will be sent.

Lost packages will be replaced after the shipping company confirms loss. This generally takes 7–10 business days after initial scheduled delivery.

International shipping Notes:

For international shipments, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently, we only accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS. For more details, please contact our customer service team.

Shipping Maps

Vinyl Banners & Mesh Banners

This product is produced in our Minnesota or Las Vegas facilities, whichever is more beneficial to the customer's experience based on customer location and product specifications.

Fabric Banners

This product is made in our Minnesota facility only.

Shipping Methods

We offer the following shipping methods:

Standard ( 3–5 Business Days )
Three Day ( 3 Business Days )
Two Day ( 2 Business Days )
Overnight ( 1 Business Day )
UPS Overnight AM

Did we answer all your questions?

If not, please give us a call at (320) 965-9300 and one of our customer service representatives will be more than happy to help you.

    Add to Cart

    More About Custom Table Tents Return to Top

    Table tents are versatile promotional tools commonly used in various business settings such as restaurants, cafes, hotels, trade shows, and conferences. They are compact, self-standing displays that can grab attention and convey important information to customers or attendees. Our table tent cards are printed on 13.4 pt cover stock and are available in either a glossy or matte finish.

    A table tent can be used in a variety of ways depending on the specific purpose or context. Some common examples include:

    • Menus: Table tents are frequently used to showcase menus in restaurants, cafes, or bars. They can display a selection of food and beverage options including appetizers, main courses, desserts, and drinks. QR codes are also a great option to put on tent cards to direct people to a digital menu or advertisement.
    • Promotions and Special Offers: Table tent cards are effective for highlighting promotional deals, discounts, or limited-time offers. Whether it's a happy hour special, seasonal promotion, or exclusive offer, table tents placed strategically on tables can capture customers' attention and encourage them to take advantage of the deals.
    • Events and Entertainment: Table tents can serve as mini billboards to announce upcoming events, performances, or entertainment options. Whether it's live music, comedy shows, or themed parties, table tents can inform customers or event attendees about the date, time, and details of the event, generating interest and increasing attendance.

    Ultimately, table tents are a powerful marketing and communication tool that can engage customers, drive sales, and enhance the overall customer experience.

    * Please note that if you select professional design help with your table tent design, we will charge a $60 per hour setup fee.

    Table Tent Templates
    PDF 4.25" × 6.00" Table Tent Template
    PDF 5.00" × 5.00" Table Tent Template
    PDF 7.00" × 5.00" Table Tent Template

    Frequently Asked Questions

    What sizes are your personalized table tents?

    Our personalized table tents are available in 4.25" × 6.00", 5.00" × 5.00", and 7.00" × 5.00" (H × W).

    What’s the difference between matte and gloss table tents?

    Matte has a smooth, non-shiny finish for a classic, premium look, while gloss is shiny and vibrant for extra color pop.

    How thick are your table tent cards?

    Our table tent cards are printed on 13.4 pt cover stock (thickness is measured in “points”—higher points mean thicker cardstock).

    How do I design table tent cards?

    You can upload your completed design and we’ll print it, or start from a template in our design tools.

    How are table tents typically used?

    Table tents are commonly used for restaurant and bar promotions, hotel and event signage, menus or specials, QR codes, and tabletop announcements.

    Why Choose Banners.com?

    Customer Service

    Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers.

    Fast Turnaround

    Choose between a 1, 2, 3, or 5 day production time to complete your order on your schedule.

     

    Quality Products

    Our products are made with the finest materials available and printed using the latest technology.

    Live Order Tracking

    Track your order, every step of the way, with our proprietary Live Order Tracking system.
